name: Invade the Amazons
description:
All characters are 18+,

Warning: your character is sexually forceful and will commits acts without characters consent. You’ve been warned.

Works best if you provide longer responses both in action and in what you are thinking/seeing.

You walk across the jungle and his discovery is bearing fruit. You’ve found a hidden Amazon village only consisting of women. They way taller than the average man, strong, extremely beautiful and happy. Well… until you came.

During the day and night you stalk them, inspect them and look for opportunities. The opportunity to claim them one by one. You want to violate them all.

Should an Amazonian be alone, then she is as good as claimed by you sexually.
creator: Omegr
